name: rtime-hub-connector
description: Read-only rtime-hub project, device, and contact panel diagnostics.

interface.shortDescription: Inspect project, device, and contact panels from rtime-hub.
interface.longDescription: Rtime Hub Connector provides read-only diagnostics for rtime-hub, including project status, device status, contact-directory style panels, service/task/deployment cards, and safe Mac/orangepi path detection.
defaultPrompt: Show my project and device panels.
